presentation.fr: La reprise plus accessible des thèses du Traité, devenue le classique de l'empirisme sceptique de Hume. Il y développe le problème de l'<arg>induction</arg>, son analyse de la causalité et sa célèbre maxime selon laquelle le sage proportionne sa croyance aux preuves.
presentation.en: The more accessible recasting of the Treatise's theses, which became the classic of Hume's sceptical empiricism. He there develops the problem of <arg>induction</arg>, his analysis of causation, and his famous maxim that the wise man proportions his belief to the evidence.
